text:
miwi        2011-02-05 10:28:27 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    japanese             Makefile 
  Added files:
    japanese/tegaki-recognize Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                              pkg-plist 
    japanese/tegaki-recognize/files patch-setup.py 
  Log:
  Tegaki Main program:
  
      * is free and open-source
      * is multi-plaform
      * focuses on Chinese (simplified and traditional) and Japanese characters
      * supports 2 different recognition engines
      * aspires to work on both desktop-PCs and mobile devices
  
  WWW: http://www.tegaki.org/
  
  PR:             ports/149690
  Submitted by:   Timothy Beyer <beyert at cs.ucr.edu>
  Feature safe:   yes
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.761     +1 -0      ports/japanese/Makefile
